description: Large bifolio of accounts in Arabic script. Might be fiscal. On recto, sections are headed by names of profession ("the dyers (al-ṣabbāghīn)... the millers (al-ṭaḥḥānīn)..."), each with lists of names with numbers underneath. On verso, one page was reused for a Judaeo-Arabic list written at 180 degrees in a crude hand, mentioning names such as Bū l-ʿAlāʾ, Baqāʾ b. Nuʿmān, and Ibrāhīm.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
